themes.label: Covenant
themes.summary: This chapter points to covenant, promise, oath, inheritance, or the enduring faithfulness of God. Local Strong’s word study and cross references data reinforce this reading across 7 verses. Commentary leans on "The pattern of blessing-for-obedience and curse-for-disobedience permeates ancient Near Easte...". Word-study detail reinforces "בְּרִ֨ית: the covenant - a compact (because made by passing between pieces of flesh)".
